concept: each data point is a glass tube that fills with the subject's own photo to its value, side by side
code:
for i in range(n):
    frac = clamp(values[i]/vmax) * reveal
    x = RX0 + 20 + i*300
    w = 220; h = 600; y = 500
    img = images.get(labels[i]) if labels[i] in images else None
    fill_image(img, frac, x, y, w, h, direction='up', color=ACCENT)
    d.rounded_rectangle([x,y,x+w,y+h], outline=rgba(TEXT,255), width=4)
    text(labels[i], x+w/2, y+h+16, size=34, center=True)
    text(str(int(values[i])), x+w/2, y-60, size=48, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)

concept: two subjects face off, each emitting expanding sound rings whose count and reach scale with its decibel value
code:
cy = 600
wimg = images.get(labels[0])
jimg = images.get(labels[1])
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    rings = int(clamp(v / vmax) * 6.0 * reveal) + 1
    for k in range(rings):
        rr = 60 + k * 52
        a = int(190.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 1.0)) * reveal)
        d.ellipse([cxs - rr, cy - rr, cxs + rr, cy + rr],
                  outline=rgba(col, a), width=6)
img = wimg
for i in range(2):
    img = wimg if i == 0 else jimg
    cxs = RX0 + 240 if i == 0 else RX1 - 240
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 330
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 300:
            h = 300
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    na = clamp((reveal - 0.4) / 0.6)
    text(str(int(values[i])) + ' dB', cxs, cy - 330, size=70, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + 210, size=40, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('1.5x LOUDER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, 950, size=54, color=WARN, center=True)
topic: Loudest Animals — whale vs jet engine

concept: the single subject sits at the center of sound rings radiating to the frame edges, its value huge at the top
code:
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
cy = 620
img = images.get(labels[0])
rings = int(9.0 * reveal) + 1
for k in range(rings):
    rr = 100 + k * 95
    a = int(170.0 * (1.0 - k / (rings + 2.0)))
    d.ellipse([cx - rr, cy - rr, cx + rr, cy + rr],
              outline=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, a), width=8)
if img is not None:
    asp = img.width / img.height
    w = 660
    h = int(w / asp)
    if h > 500:
        h = 500
        w = int(h * asp)
    paste(img, cx - w // 2, cy - h // 2, w, h)
na = clamp((reveal - 0.3) / 0.5)
text(str(int(values[0])) + ' dB', cx, RTOP + 40, size=120,
     color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
text('the loudest animal EVER', cx, cy + 300, size=46, center=True)
text(labels[0], cx, cy + 360, size=40, color=ACCENT, center=True)

concept: two pressure gauges sweep to each contender's PSI, their photos mounted under the dials
code:
for i in range(2):
    v = values[i]
    cxs = RX0 + 250 if i == 0 else RX1 - 250
    cy = 560
    r = 210
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, 390,
          fill=rgba(TEXT, 90), width=16)
    sweep = 150.0 + 240.0 * clamp(v / vmax) * reveal
    d.arc([cxs - r, cy - r, cxs + r, cy + r], 150, int(sweep),
          fill=rgba(col, 255), width=16)
    ang = sweep * math.pi / 180.0
    nx = cxs + int((r - 30) * math.cos(ang))
    ny = cy + int((r - 30) * math.sin(ang))
    d.line([cxs, cy, nx, ny], fill=rgba(col, 255), width=10)
    d.ellipse([cxs - 16, cy - 16, cxs + 16, cy + 16], fill=rgba(col, 255))
    if i == 0:
        img = subject_image('saltwater crocodile open jaws close up')
    else:
        img = subject_image('human man smiling portrait face')
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        w = 310
        h = int(w / asp)
        if h > 220:
            h = 220
            w = int(h * asp)
        paste(img, cxs - w // 2, cy + r + 10, w, h)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' PSI', cxs, cy - r - 100, size=62, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cxs, cy + r + 240, size=38, center=True)
mid = clamp((reveal - 0.7) / 0.3)
if mid > 0:
    text('23x STRONGER', (RX0 + RX1) // 2, RBOT - 80, size=56,
         color=WARN, center=True)
topic: two contenders on sweeping pressure dials

concept: a row of planet thermometers, each glass tube filling with a heat-glow color from cold blue to scorching red as it rises to that planet's temperature, the planet's own photo riding at the top
code:
cols = n
avail_w = RX1 - RX0
slot = avail_w / cols
tube_w = int(slot * 0.62)
base_y = RBOT - 90
top_y = RTOP + 300
tube_h = base_y - top_y
vmin = min(values)
span = max(1.0, vmax - vmin)
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    lr = clamp((reveal - i * 0.13) / 0.75)
    frac = clamp((v - vmin) / span, 0.08, 1.0)
    t = clamp(v / vmax) if vmax > 0 else 0.5
    col = (int(lerp(90, 255, t)), int(lerp(150, 100, t)), int(lerp(255, 60, t)))
    cx = int(RX0 + i * slot + slot / 2)
    x0, x1 = cx - tube_w // 2, cx + tube_w // 2
    d.rounded_rectangle([x0, top_y, x1, base_y], radius=tube_w // 2,
                        outline=rgba(TEXT, 150), width=6)
    fh = int(tube_h * frac * lr)
    if fh > 6:
        d.rounded_rectangle([x0 + 10, base_y - fh, x1 - 10, base_y - 4],
                            radius=16, fill=rgba(col, 235))
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    iw = tube_w + 34
    ih = 190
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        ih = int(iw / asp)
        if ih > 210:
            ih = 210
            iw = int(ih * asp)
        photo_y = top_y - ih - 24
        paste(img, cx - iw // 2, photo_y, iw, ih)
        d.ellipse([cx - iw // 2, photo_y, cx + iw // 2, photo_y + ih],
                  outline=rgba(col, int(255 * lr)), width=5)
    na = clamp((lr - 0.35) / 0.6)
    ytxt = max(base_y - fh - 56, top_y + 24)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' F', cx, ytxt, size=36, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cx, base_y + 18, size=28, center=True)

concept: a five-bar volume meter, each bar rising to that animal's decibel level with its real photo riding the top of the bar, the loudest bar pulsing with sound-wave ticks
code:
cols = n
avail_w = RX1 - RX0
slot = avail_w / cols
bar_w = int(slot * 0.5)
base_y = RBOT - 90
top_cap = RTOP + 470
for i in range(n):
    v = values[i]
    lr = clamp((reveal - i * 0.11) / 0.7)
    frac = clamp(v / vmax, 0.14, 1.0)
    bh = int((base_y - top_cap) * frac * lr)
    cx = int(RX0 + i * slot + slot / 2)
    x0, x1 = cx - bar_w // 2, cx + bar_w // 2
    col = HIGHLIGHT if i == 0 else ACCENT
    bar_top = base_y - bh
    d.rounded_rectangle([x0, bar_top, x1, base_y], radius=18, fill=rgba(col, 210))
    img = images.get(labels[i])
    card_y = bar_top - 20
    ih = 180
    iw = int(bar_w * 1.7)
    if img is not None:
        asp = img.width / img.height
        ih = int(iw / asp)
        if ih > 210:
            ih = 210
            iw = int(ih * asp)
        card_y = bar_top - ih - 22
        if card_y < RTOP + 260:
            card_y = RTOP + 260
        d.rounded_rectangle([cx - iw // 2 - 6, card_y - 6, cx + iw // 2 + 6, card_y + ih + 6],
                            radius=24, outline=rgba(col, int(255 * lr)), width=5)
        paste(img, cx - iw // 2, card_y, iw, ih)
    text(str(int(v)) + ' dB', cx, card_y - 54, size=32, color=col, center=True)
    text(labels[i], cx, base_y + 16, size=25, center=True)
    if i == 0:
        pulse = int(6 * (0.5 + 0.5 * math.sin(reveal * 18)))
        for k in range(pulse):
            yy = bar_top - 30 - k * 20
            d.line([x0 - 20, yy, x0 - 4, yy], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 200), width=5)
            d.line([x1 + 4, yy, x1 + 20, yy], fill=rgba(HIGHLIGHT, 200), width=5)

concept: the crocodile's jaws bite down at the top, then a grid of real bowling balls stacks up beneath it one by one — each ball IS the crush count
code:
v = values[0]
per = 500.0
count = max(1, int(round(v / per)))
cx = (RX0 + RX1) // 2
text(str(int(v)) + ' PSI', cx, RTOP + 30, size=64, color=HIGHLIGHT, center=True)
img = images.get(labels[0]) or subject_image('saltwater crocodile open jaws close up')
jh = 250
jy = RTOP + 150
if img is not None:
    asp = img.width / img.height
    jw = int(jh * asp)
    if jw > 520:
        jw = 520
        jh = int(jw / asp)
    jr = clamp(reveal / 0.35)
    paste(img, cx - jw // 2, jy, jw, int(jh * (0.8 + 0.2 * jr)))
    jbot = jy + jh
else:
    jbot = jy + jh
text(labels[0], cx, jbot + 12, size=30, center=True)
ball = subject_image('bowling ball')
cols = 4
bsz = 175
gap = 22
row_w = cols * bsz + (cols - 1) * gap
gx0 = cx - row_w // 2
by0 = jbot + 70
for k in range(count):
    lr = clamp((reveal - k * 0.1) / 0.55)
    if lr <= 0:
        continue
    col_i = k % cols
    row_i = k // cols
    bx = gx0 + col_i * (bsz + gap)
    yy = by0 + row_i * (bsz + gap)
    sc = 0.55 + 0.45 * lr
    bs = int(bsz * sc)
    off = (bsz - bs) // 2
    if ball is not None:
        paste(ball, bx + off, yy + off, bs, bs)
    else:
        d.ellipse([bx, yy, bx + bsz, yy + bsz], fill=rgba(WARN, int(255 * lr)))
rows_n = (count + cols - 1) // cols
capy = by0 + rows_n * (bsz + gap) + 24
text('= ' + str(count) + ' bowling balls, crushed in one bite', cx, capy, size=34, center=True)
topic: Bite Force Champions — single-stat crush count
